title: Inheritance
creator: Emerson Porter
description: “A piece reflecting on the life lived by Pa, and what makes features of the self worth inheriting.”

title: My Father is a lot of things (and maybe something like me)
creator: Emerson Porter
description: "A piece introducing the 'Father' and contemplating the similarites and differeneces between him and the speaker."

title: My mother wasn't always right (but she was always enough)
creator: Emerson Porter
description: "A piece introducing the 'Mother' and contemplating the similarites and differeneces between her and the speaker."

title: Kids are mean (they just don't understand)
creator: Emerson Porter
description: "A piece detailing the death of 'Grama' and the affects it had on the young speaker and their family."

title: "God isn't Good"
creator: Emerson Porter
description: "A piece reflecting on the death of 'Grama' and the way it impacted the speaker's relationship with God and 'Mother.'"

title: Last Allowance
creator: Emerson Porter
description: "A piece about the rediscovery of an old card left for the speaker by 'Grama.'"

title: Peter Pan (knowing she missed her chance)
creator: Emerson Porter
description: "A reflection on the man now adult 'Brother' is growing up to be."

title: In the weeds
creator: Emerson Porter
description: “A piece about ants and the arbitrary value systems applied between flowers and weeds.”

title: Celebration of Life
creator: Emerson Porter
description: "A piece about the death of 'Grandmother' and the inheritance of her name."

title: again and again
creator: Emerson Porter
description: "A piece about the distance between the speaker and 'Brother.'"

title: The Point of Goliath is That He Lost
creator: Emerson Porter
description: "A piece about the speaker's struggle living with OCD."

title: Ode to Pops
creator: Emerson Porter
description: "A piece about the complicated nature of the speaker's relationship with 'Father.'"

title: Pomegrante
creator: Emerson Porter
description: “A piece of enquiry into the self, asking if knowing oneself to be multiple things, can be the same thing as knowing what one is”
